subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is worthy and befitting, Whose love is the cause of unity among the peoples of the world, and Whose servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که محبتش سبب اتفاق اهل آفاق است و عبودیتش علت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @personal instructions, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @love and unity
